title: Indigold Node
description: An entity in the Knowledge/Identity graph: Project, Person, Concept, Source, etc. Every node carries provenance via truth_layers and a Memory Value Score.

id.description: Stable identifier. Used as a lightweight handle for just-in-time dereferencing.

type.description: Entity class. Keeps Identity / Knowledge / Execution concerns separable.

snippet.description: Short high-signal summary (<= ~280 chars) for feeds and context packs.

body_ref.description: Relative path into fake_vault/ for the full Markdown body. Lightweight identifier — NOT inlined.

engine.description: Owning engine. The graph spans engines but a node has a single owner (Separation of Concerns).

truth_layers.description: One or more epistemological layers this node participates in (A=Raw .. F=Action).

primary_truth_layer.description: The dominant classification used for confidence/UX labelling.

provenance.description: Source node ids this node was derived from. Required (may be empty) so derived data always traces to Raw.

privacy.description: Privacy by default — everything is 'private' unless explicitly downgraded.
